summary: Matched several HSD_LObj/light-object functions and converted a large portion of sysdolphin baselib lobj assembly into C, while leaving HSD_LObjSetup and HSD_LObjGetLightVector as NON_MATCHING asm-backed bridges. The PR also formalized LObj names across existing asm and stage/ground code, moved/expanded lobj declarations, adjusted GX light constants and GXInitLightColor's signature, and relocated vector prototypes into dolphin/mtx.h. Review evidence is sparse but confirms the PR was accepted as up-to-date/OK, with NON_MATCHING wrappers intentionally tolerated for the remaining gaps.
what_changed: Implemented a large new C body for HSD_LObj in src/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.c, including HSD_LObjGetActiveByID, HSD_LObjGetActiveByIndex, LObjUpdateFunc, HSD_LObjAnim, HSD_LObjAnimAll, HSD_LObjReqAnim, and HSD_LObjReqAnimAll.
Reduced asm/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.s substantially, removing hundreds of lines for functions now expressed in C and renaming remaining asm symbols/call targets to HSD_LObj names.

Added or exposed HSD_LObjGetPosition, HSD_LObjGetInterest, HSD_LObjGetPositionWObj, and HSD_LObjGetInterestWObj names at call sites, replacing prior func_80366D70, func_80366E38, func_80366E78, and func_80366E90 references where shown.
Renamed animation call sites from func_80365678 and func_803656F8 to HSD_LObjAnimAll and HSD_LObjReqAnimAll across melee asm files and ground.c.

Added src/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.h with HSD_LObj structs, light descriptors, animation constants, LOBJ flag definitions, method macros, and prototypes; deleted the older include/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.h copy.
Introduced active_lights as HSD_LObj *active_lights[GX_MAX_LIGHT] and used HSD_LightID2Index plus GX_MAX_LIGHT bounds in the active-light lookup helpers.
Added HSD_LObjGetLightVector and HSD_LObjSetup C attempts guarded by NON_MATCHING, with matching inline asm versions retained when NON_MATCHING is not enabled.
Changed GX_MAX_LIGHT in src/dolphin/gx/GXEnum.h from 0x100 to 9, matching use as a light-count bound in LObj code rather than as a light bitmask.
Changed GXInitLightColor to take GXColor by value instead of GXColor *, updated GXLight.c/GXLight.h, and simplified initialize.c to pass lbl_804D5E1C directly.
Moved PSVECSubtract and PSVECNormalize declarations into include/dolphin/mtx.h and removed stale duplicate vector declarations from include/functions.h.
smart_moves: Kept partially understood but not-yet-matching functions behind NON_MATCHING instead of blocking the whole LObj progress, preserving known-good assembly for HSD_LObjSetup and HSD_LObjGetLightVector.

Renamed call targets in unrelated asm files as soon as the LObj functions were identified, improving global searchability and helping future decompilers recognize lighting behavior in stage and shadow code.
Pulled WObj accessor names into functions.h and ground.c, connecting LObj position/interest behavior to the WObj animation system instead of leaving anonymous func_80366xxx calls.

Used the HSD_A_L_* animation channel constants in LObjUpdateFunc, making the switch table readable and documenting how animation data maps to visibility, attenuation, cutoff, reference distance/brightness, and light color.
Changed GXInitLightColor to pass GXColor by value where the generated code and call sites wanted a direct color object, reducing temporary pointer boilerplate in initialize.c.
Added proper mtx prototypes for PSVECSubtract and PSVECNormalize near other vector APIs, which supports HSD_LObjGetLightVector and avoids relying on broad catch-all declarations.
decomp_lessons: When matching baselib systems, propagate newly identified function names through asm call sites immediately; this PR shows HSD_LObjAnimAll, HSD_LObjReqAnimAll, HSD_LObjGetPosition, and HSD_LObjGetInterest becoming recognizable across fighters, stages, shadows, and text asm.

For object systems with nested animation objects, model both the primary AObj and dependent WObj animations in the C implementation: HSD_LObjAnim and HSD_LObjReqAnim call AObj helpers and then position/interest WObj helpers.
Dirty-flag behavior is central to lighting setup: HSD_LObjSetup only reloads GX light objects after color/specular state changes set LOBJ_DIFF_DIRTY or LOBJ_SPEC_DIRTY.
Be careful when a GX enum value is being used as a count rather than a bitmask; this PR's GX_MAX_LIGHT change to 9 supports array sizing and range checks for active_lights.
For visibility animation matching, the LObj code uses a float threshold around 0.5 and flips LOBJ_HIDDEN based on HSD_A_L_VIS.

When source C is close but not matching due to stack layout/register allocation, keep the readable C attempt under NON_MATCHING and the original asm under the normal build path as a bridge for later work.

Header placement matters in this codebase: moving lobj.h from include/sysdolphin/baselib to src/sysdolphin/baselib accompanied the deeper baselib decomp work, but future changes should verify include-path conventions before duplicating headers.
naming_conventions: Use HSD_LObj* prefixes for light-object APIs rather than func_80366xxx labels.
Use HSD_LObjAnimAll and HSD_LObjReqAnimAll for list-wide operations that iterate through lobj->next.
Use HSD_LObjGetPosition and HSD_LObjGetInterest for retrieving light vectors into Vec storage.
Use HSD_LObjGetPositionWObj and HSD_LObjGetInterestWObj for accessors returning the underlying HSD_WObj pointers.
Use LOBJ_* flag names for HSD_LObj flags, including LOBJ_HIDDEN, LOBJ_RAW_PARAM, LOBJ_DIFF_DIRTY, and LOBJ_SPEC_DIRTY.
Use HSD_A_L_* constants for light animation channel IDs such as HSD_A_L_VIS, HSD_A_L_A0, HSD_A_L_CUTOFF, HSD_A_L_LITC_R, and HSD_A_L_LITC_A.
Use GX_MAX_LIGHT as the active light array bound in LObj code.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Converted matched chunks from asm/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.s into src/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.c while keeping remaining nonmatched functions in assembly.
Annotated remaining asm call sites with resolved HSD_LObj symbol names without changing instruction bytes, e.g. bl func_80365678 became bl HSD_LObjAnimAll.
Used NON_MATCHING sections for HSD_LObjGetLightVector and HSD_LObjSetup: readable C is present for documentation and future work, while inline asm preserves the matching build.
HSD_LObjGetLightVector's matching asm initializes local default Vec constants, calls HSD_LObjGetPosition and HSD_LObjGetInterest, then uses PSVECSubtract and PSVECNormalize.
HSD_LObjSetup's asm preserves exact register/stack behavior around GXInitLightColor, GXLoadLightObjImm, GXInitLightAttn, dirty flag clears, and shininess/specular handling.
Ground/stage asm renames were applied broadly to keep relocation targets stable while improving symbol knowledge.

review_feedback.body: Up-to-date and `OK`. I had to wrap `HSD_LObjSetup` and  `HSD_LObjGetLightVector` in `NON_MATCHING` for now but it should be quite easy to bridge the gap.
review_feedback.lesson: Partial LObj decomp was acceptable because the remaining mismatches were isolated behind NON_MATCHING and expected to be bridgeable.

review_feedback.body: Found some extra files created by the merge. Fixing.
review_feedback.lesson: Watch for accidental merge-created files in long-running decomp branches.
Final approval had no additional technical notes in the available dump.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that removed NON_MATCHING from HSD_LObjSetup or HSD_LObjGetLightVector.
Search for subsequent corrections to GX_MAX_LIGHT or GXLightID semantics after this PR.
Audit later lobj.h moves or include-path cleanups involving src/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.h versus include/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.h.
Look for PRs that match HSD_LObjGetPosition, HSD_LObjGetInterest, HSD_LObjGetPositionWObj, and HSD_LObjGetInterestWObj fully in C.
Search for additional stage/ground PRs that reuse HSD_LObjAnimAll and HSD_LObjReqAnimAll naming.
